description: Same character (Oko) within the same product line. Both cards are exclusives of the Throne of Eldraine Planeswalker Deck precon (ELD-309 and ELD-312). Oko's Hospitality tutors for 'Oko, the Trickster' by name in its rules text and is flavor-signed '—Oko'; its art shows Oko in the canonical stag/antler shapeshift form from the Wildered Quest novella, while ELD-309 shows him in his standard antlered-fey form.
citations: [Scryfall: ELD-309 oracle text + ELD-312 oracle text and flavor_text]
[MTG Wiki: Throne of Eldraine: The Wildered Quest]

other_candidates_considered.candidate: WAR uncommon planeswalker cycle (Angrath, Captain of Chaos + Kiora, Behemoth Beckoner)
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Only 2 candidate cards from the 20-card cycle are in this batch. Edge would be redundant once the cycle node exists; flagged as a Mr. Nodeley candidate for a future pass once a third batch member surfaces (Kasmina or Vivien at #196 / #175 already cited as sibling members in Kiora's Related cards).
Story-spotlight partners (God-Eternal Oketra/Bontu, Liliana Dreadhorde General) are referenced in Despark's Related cards but none are trivia-passed in this batch. No second endpoint available.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose ↔ Elenda, the Dusk Rose (saint-heretic pair)
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Elenda is named in Vito's Related cards as the canonical saint Vito broke with, but Elenda is not in our enriched corpus for this batch. Strong candidate for a future pass if Elenda surfaces.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Enchanted Carriage Cinderella-cycle (Turn into a Pumpkin / Fairy Guidemother / Midnight Clock)
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Designer-confirmed cycle per Rosewater's 'More Odds & Ends: Throne of Eldraine', but only one cycle member (Enchanted Carriage) is in this enriched batch. Flagged as a Mr. Nodeley candidate for a future pass.
